summary: Iteration 39: Adaptive video quality feature fully verified. Cloudinary transformations (w_1280/w_720, q_auto, f_auto) correctly applied based on viewport. Desktop gets 1280p, mobile gets 720p. All video src, poster, and preload link tags contain correct transforms.
critical_code_review_comments: utils.js correctly implements optimizedVideo() and videoPoster() functions (lines 42-60)
MainLanding.jsx correctly uses optimizedVideo() and videoPoster() at lines 26-27 with isMobile detection
Hero.jsx correctly imports and uses optimizedVideo and videoPoster from utils (lines 8, 110-111)
BalieHero.jsx correctly imports and uses optimizedVideo and videoPoster from utils (lines 5, 61-62)
isMobile detection uses window.innerWidth < 768 at module/component init time - works correctly

success_rate.backend: 77% (10/13 tests passed - 3 failures are unrelated navigation endpoint tests)

seed_data_creation: Created test contact form submission with name 'TEST_AdaptiveVideo39'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adaptive video quality feature is fully implemented and working. Desktop viewport (>=768px) gets w_1280,q_auto,f_auto transforms. Mobile viewport (<768px) gets w_720,q_auto,f_auto transforms. Poster images use so_0,w_{width},q_auto,f_jpg transforms. Hero.jsx on /sauny uses photo mode (no video configured). BalieHero.jsx on /balie has video mode enabled with correct transforms.
